settings.text: Full-service architecture for residential, commercial, and adaptive reuse projects.

settings.title: New Build Residential
settings.subtitle: Custom homes designed around how you live

settings.title: Adaptive Reuse
settings.subtitle: Transforming existing structures for new purposes

settings.title: Interior Architecture
settings.subtitle: Space planning, materials, and built-in elements

settings.title: Feasibility Studies
settings.subtitle: Site analysis, zoning review, and project viability

settings.title: Discovery
settings.features:
+ Initial consultation
+ Site visit and documentation
+ Program and budget development
settings.description: We begin every project by listening. Site visits, client interviews, and research establish the foundation for design.

settings.title: Schematic Design
settings.features:
+ Concept development
+ Massing studies
+ Preliminary floor plans
settings.description: Broad design ideas take shape. We explore options through sketches, diagrams, and early 3D models.

settings.title: Design Development
settings.features:
+ Material selections
+ Detailed floor plans
+ 3D renderings
settings.description: The design is refined with specific materials, systems, and details. Renderings bring the vision to life.

settings.title: Construction Documents
settings.features:
+ Full drawing sets
+ Engineering coordination
+ Specifications
settings.description: Technical documents are produced for bidding, permitting, and construction.

settings.title: Permitting
settings.features:
+ Zoning review
+ Building department submissions
+ Approval coordination
settings.description: We navigate the approval process with the municipality on your behalf.

settings.title: Construction Administration
settings.features:
+ Contractor coordination
+ Site observations
+ Punch list and closeout
settings.description: We remain involved through construction to ensure the built work matches the design intent.

settings.title: Lakewood Residence Transformation
settings.description: A 1960s ranch home reimagined as a modern family residence with an open plan, new facade, and rear addition.

settings.title: Ready to Start?
settings.text:
(555) 340-2100
studio@formline.co

We offer free initial consultations for all project types.

settings.question: What is your typical project scope?
settings.answer: We work on projects ranging from kitchen renovations to ground-up commercial buildings. Most of our residential work falls between 1,500 and 6,000 square feet. Commercial projects vary widely.

settings.question: How are your fees structured?
settings.answer: Most projects are billed as a percentage of construction cost, typically 8–15% depending on scope and complexity. We also offer fixed-fee arrangements for smaller projects and feasibility studies.

settings.question: How long does a typical project take?
settings.answer: A residential project typically takes 9–18 months from first meeting to move-in. Design takes 3–6 months, permitting 1–3 months, and construction 6–12 months depending on scope.

settings.question: Do you handle sustainable design?
settings.answer: Sustainability is built into our process, not treated as an add-on. We design for energy efficiency, natural light, durable materials, and long-term performance on every project.

settings.question: Can you help with permits and zoning?
settings.answer: Yes. We handle all permit submissions and zoning review as part of our standard services. We have extensive experience navigating Chicago's approval process.
